message:
test(fcp-conformance): cover principal_deny + connector_deny policy-denial branches (br-ohpg7)

host_surface_preflight_simulate.rs previously asserted the policy-denial
fail-closed branch only for capability_deny. Extend with two parallel
tests that install zone-policy principal_deny / connector_deny entries
and assert that both /rpc/preflight and /rpc/simulate surface the correct
reason codes (zone_policy.principal_denied, zone_policy.connector_denied)
plus PreflightOnly receipt semantics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
